在有些地方看得出来想写的爽，但是又有点那种100万豪车是世界顶级的那种感觉。让人爽又爽不起来，有点别扭。
当然不带闹纯看爽文，也没关系"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760072917,"group_id":"7387067298449738777","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N29nAyXqVX6Jfzr6WNpLg92M3m/QS4MhnkenSpVmz3RJ","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/37d3f57b19c04d8cb6029dce0dee0062~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788862&x-signature=lyq8015ZCVO6Ay4vWbGi0Cj2uRo%3D","user_id":"1517748878585182","user_name":"步邡"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1517748878585182","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7387067298449738777","book_info":{"abstract":"【科技强国+学霸+日常文】陆远重生回高三后，发现自己的大脑突然开窍，对于数理化的天赋拉满。
原本只想凭借自己的天赋考个211大学，企图改个命。
然而最终走上了另一条学术的不归路。
“这破中学也有人能奥赛金牌？”
“嫦娥项目是谁负责的？航天也能威慑全球？”
……
竞赛，保送，直博，航天工程，军工，核武等等一系列的科研高精尖项目。
